recurring_credits.name: JetBlue Vacations Statement Credit
recurring_credits.description: $100 statement credit after purchasing a JetBlue Vacations package of $100+. One credit per calendar year.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: Receive a $100 statement credit after you purchase a JetBlue Vacations package for $100 or more with your JetBlue Business Card, with a limit of one statement credit per calendar year

_review_reason: $100 JetBlue Vacations credit requires actually purchasing a Vacations package of $100+ — borderline conditional but it's a fixed USD recurring annual credit. Operator decision on whether such 'use-it-or-lose-it' credits qualify under OpenCard convention.
_excluded: Free first checked bag for 4 passengers (qualitative)
